name: 170th Secret Coin
description: A port of Colon's 2021 April Fools mod.

reset-save.name: Reset All Save Data
reset-save.description: Allows you to reset all your save data in the mod.

ignore-free-monster.name: Free Monster
ignore-free-monster.description: When enabled, it will appear as if you have freed the monster - allowing you to use this mod without having freed it.
